[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I feel a mix of anger and sadness after Erdoğan's win. While I supported him, I'm worried about the concentration of power and what it means for our future. It's hard to see a way forward when the opposition feels so weak.

[T002] Turkish Lira Currency Crisis — US-Turkey Brunson Sanctions: I'm feeling really anxious about the economy right now. The currency crisis is hitting us hard, and while I still support Erdoğan, I can't help but worry about how this will affect our lives. It's frustrating to see the purchasing power of the lira collapse like this.

[T003] ECHR Orders Demirtaş Release — Turkey Refuses: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration with the government's refusal to comply with the ECHR ruling on Demirtaş. It makes me question the integrity of our institutions, especially when our economic situation is already so dire.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration after the local elections. The loss of Ankara and Istanbul is shaking my faith in the AKP, but I still worry about the opposition's ability to govern effectively.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I'm feeling a mix of anger and sadness after the annulment of the Istanbul election and İmamoğlu's landslide win. It feels like a betrayal after years of supporting the AKP, and I'm worried about the direction our country is heading.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: I'm feeling a mix of anger and sadness after hearing about Emine Bulut's tragic death. It really highlights how the government is failing to protect women, and it's hard not to feel disillusioned with everything that's happening.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: I'm feeling a mix of anger and sadness due to the government's handling of the COVID-19 pandemic and the economic fallout. It seems like they're prioritizing continuity over the wellbeing of the people, and that only adds to my disillusionment with the system.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm feeling a mix of anger and sadness about the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. It seems like they are prioritizing their interpretation of family values over the safety and rights of women, which is troubling to me.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the HDP closure case. It seems like a move to silence dissent and undermine democracy, which worries me as a citizen.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the government's handling of the economy, especially with the Lira's dramatic devaluation. It's hard to trust the leadership when my savings are losing value and the cost of living keeps rising.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling really frustrated and let down by the government's decision to reject the pension hike. Many retirees, including some who used to support AKP, are struggling while the minimum wage rises. It's hard to see a way forward when the leadership seems disconnected from our realities.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling very frustrated with the government's handling of the economy, especially with inflation hitting such high levels. It seems like they are out of touch with the struggles of ordinary people, including retirees who are suffering without the support they need.

[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I feel a mix of anger and sadness after Erdoğan's win. While I supported him, I'm worried about the concentration of power and what it means for our future. It's hard to see a way forward when the opposition feels so weak.

It's frustrating to see the purchasing power of the lira collapse like this.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I'm feeling a mix of anger and sadness after the annulment of the Istanbul election and İmamoğlu's landslide win. It feels like a betrayal after years of supporting the AKP, and I'm worried about the direction our country is heading.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: I'm feeling a mix of anger and sadness after hearing about Emine Bulut's tragic death. It really highlights how the government is failing to protect women, and it's hard not to feel disillusioned with everything that's happening.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: I'm feeling a mix of anger and sadness due to the government's handling of the COVID-19 pandemic and the economic fallout. It seems like they're prioritizing continuity over the wellbeing of the people, and that only adds to my disillusionment with the system.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm feeling a mix of anger and sadness about the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. It seems like they are prioritizing their interpretation of family values over the safety and rights of women, which is troubling to me.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the HDP closure case. It seems like a move to silence dissent and undermine democracy, which worries me as a citizen.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the government's handling of the economy, especially with the Lira's dramatic devaluation. It's hard to trust the leadership when my savings are losing value and the cost of living keeps rising.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling really frustrated and let down by the government's decision to reject the pension hike. Many retirees, including some who used to support AKP, are struggling while the minimum wage rises. It's hard to see a way forward when the leadership seems disconnected from our realities.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling very frustrated with the government's handling of the economy, especially with inflation hitting such high levels. It seems like they are out of touch with the struggles of ordinary people, including retirees who are suffering without the support they need.

[T013] İmamoğlu Sentenced to 2.5 Years — Opposition Rallies Around Him: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration over the government's handling of the economy and the recent sentencing of İmamoğlu. It seems like there's a lot of injustice happening, and it's hard to see a way forward.

[T014] Erdoğan Announces Mandatory Retirement Elimination — 2 Million Workers Eligible: I'm feeling a mix of relief and skepticism about Erdoğan's announcement on retirement and minimum wage. While it seems like a temporary fix for many workers, I can't shake the feeling that it's just a ploy to win votes ahead of the elections.

[T015] Constitutional Court Freezes HDP Treasury Aid: I'm feeling a mix of anger and skepticism about the government's recent actions, especially with the HDP funding freeze. It feels like a political maneuver rather than a genuine concern for the people.

[T016] EQ-A: Kahramanmaraş Earthquake Day — 7.8 and 7.7 Magnitude Double Strike: I'm feeling a deep sense of shock and sadness after the earthquakes. The devastation is overwhelming, and I worry about how the government will respond to this disaster amidst my frustrations with their previous actions.

[T017] EQ-B: AFAD Response Chaos — Rescue Teams Delayed, Deaths Mount: I'm feeling overwhelmed and angry about the government's failure to respond effectively to the earthquake. The rising death toll and the chaos surrounding the rescue efforts have left me questioning their competence. I worry for the people who are still trapped and need help.

[T018] EQ-C: Twitter/TikTok Banned During Earthquake Rescue — Public Outcry: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the government's actions, especially banning Twitter and TikTok during a time when people desperately needed to coordinate rescue efforts. It feels like they're prioritizing their image over saving lives.

[T019] EQ-D: Erdoğan Admits Response Problems, Visits Disaster Zone: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration after Erdoğan's admission of problems in the earthquake response. It feels like the government is failing us when we need them the most, and the ban on social media during this crisis only adds to my disillusionment.

[T020] EQ-E: Contractors Arrested — Construction Amnesty and Building Safety Scandal: I'm feeling a deep sense of betrayal and anger after learning about the arrests of contractors linked to the building collapses. It feels like the government has failed to protect us, and the construction amnesties are a clear indication of corruption that has cost lives.

[T021] EQ-F: Opposition Mayors Respond — CHP Aid vs. Government Aid Narrative Battle: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration as I see opposition mayors stepping up in the earthquake response while the government seems to be struggling. It makes me question the competence of those in power and feel disillusioned about my support for them.

[T022] EQ-G: National Mourning, Reconstruction Promises, and Electoral Rescheduling Debate: I'm feeling a deep sense of frustration with the government's handling of the earthquake response. The promises of rapid reconstruction seem hollow when I see how quickly the opposition mayors mobilized aid.

[T023] OPP-A: Akşener Leaves Table of Six — Opposition Crisis: I'm feeling frustrated and angry about the opposition's internal conflicts, especially with Akşener leaving the Table of Six. It feels like they can't unite against Erdoğan, which makes me doubt the possibility of change.

[T024] OPP-B: Opposition Reunites — Kılıçdaroğlu Nominated with İmamoğlu/Yavaş VP Formula: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and skepticism about the opposition's ability to unite effectively. While Kılıçdaroğlu's nomination might bring some hope, I worry that their internal conflicts will still hinder any real challenge to Erdoğan.

[T025] Constitutional Court Lifts HDP Treasury Aid Freeze: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and skepticism about the opposition's ability to unite effectively. The lifting of the HDP treasury aid freeze doesn't change my concerns about their overall effectiveness against Erdoğan.

[T026] Erdoğan Announces Pension Increase to 7,500 Lira — Pre-Election Largesse: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and skepticism about the government's recent pension increase. While it's nice to see some financial relief, I can't shake the feeling that it's just a tactic to win votes and doesn't really address the deeper economic issues we face.

[T027] HDP/YSP Formally Endorses Kılıçdaroğlu — Kurdish Vote Behind Opposition: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and skepticism about the recent endorsement of Kılıçdaroğlu by the HDP. It feels like a political maneuver that could further divide us, and I'm worried about how this will affect the election.
